---
title: "Social & Cultural Geography"
subtitle: "Spatial dimensions of culture, identity, religion, language, and social structures."
author: "Geography Team"
toc: true
toc-depth: 3
---



Welcome to the **Social & Cultural Geography** module of Geography OpenCourseWare. This course explores how culture, identity, religion, ethnicity, and social structures are distributed across space and how they interact with geographic landscapes and processes.

---

## UGC NET Syllabus

* **Concept of Culture, Cultural Complexes, Areas and Region, Cultural Heritage, Cultural Ecology, Cultural Convergence.**
* **Social Structure and Processes, Social Well-being and Quality of Life, Social Exclusion.**
* **Spatial distribution of social groups in India (Tribe, Caste, Religion and Language).**
* **Environment and Human Health, Diseases Ecology.**
* **Nutritional Status (etiological conditions, classification and spatial and seasonal distributional patterns with special reference to India).**
* **Health Care Planning and Policies in India, Medical Tourism in India.**

---

{{< include social-and-cultural/nature-and-scope-of-social-geography.md >}}

{{< include social-and-cultural/social-structure-and-processes.md >}}

{{< include social-and-cultural/ethnicity.md >}}

{{< include social-and-cultural/tribe.md >}}

{{< include social-and-cultural/dialect.md >}}

{{< include social-and-cultural/language.md >}}

{{< include social-and-cultural/caste.md >}}

{{< include social-and-cultural/religion.md >}}

{{< include social-and-cultural/concept-of-social-well-being.md >}}

{{< include social-and-cultural/nature-and-scope-of-cultural-geography.md >}}

{{< include social-and-cultural/environment-and-culture.md >}}

{{< include social-and-cultural/concept-of-culture-areas-and-cultural-regions.md >}}

{{< include social-and-cultural/theories-of-tribal-groups.md >}}

{{< include social-and-cultural/dwelling-places-as-cultural-expressions.md >}}

{{< include social-and-cultural/regional-concept-in-geography.md >}}

{{< include social-and-cultural/application-of-regional-concepts-in-planning.md >}}

{{< include social-and-cultural/concept-of-planning-region.md >}}

{{< include social-and-cultural/regional-hierarchy.md >}}

{{< include social-and-cultural/types-of-regions-and-regional-delineation-methods.md >}}

{{< include social-and-cultural/conceptual-and-theoretical-framework-of-regional-planning.md >}}

{{< include social-and-cultural/regional-planning-in-india.md >}}

{{< include social-and-cultural/concept-of-development-and-indicators-of-development.md >}}

{{< include social-and-cultural/regional-imbalances.md >}}

{{< include social-and-cultural/historical-perspective-of-indian-society.md >}}

{{< include social-and-cultural/racial-linguistic-and-ethnic-diversities.md >}}

{{< include social-and-cultural/religious-minorities.md >}}

{{< include social-and-cultural/major-tribes-tribal-areas-and-their-problems.md >}}

{{< include social-and-cultural/cultural-regions.md >}}

{{< include social-and-cultural/growth-distribution-and-density-of-population.md >}}

{{< include social-and-cultural/demographic-attributes-sex-ratio-age-structure-literacy-rate-work-force-dependency-ratio-longevity.md >}}

{{< include social-and-cultural/migration-inter-regional-interaregional-and-international-and-associated-problems.md >}}

{{< include social-and-cultural/population-problems-and-policies.md >}}

{{< include social-and-cultural/health-indicators.md >}}

{{< include social-and-cultural/types-patterns-and-morphology-of-rural-settlements.md >}}

{{< include social-and-cultural/urban-developments.md >}}

{{< include social-and-cultural/morphology-of-indian-cities.md >}}

{{< include social-and-cultural/functional-classification-of-indian-cities.md >}}

{{< include social-and-cultural/conurbations-and-metropolitan-regions.md >}}

{{< include social-and-cultural/urban-sprawl.md >}}

{{< include social-and-cultural/slums-and-associated-problems.md >}}

{{< include social-and-cultural/town-planning.md >}}

{{< include social-and-cultural/problems-of-urbanisation-and-remedies.md >}}
